title: Fix Persistent Loading Spinner on Quick Object Toggle
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the loading spinner to dismiss correctly when I quickly toggle objects, so that I don't get stuck on a loading screen requiring a browser refresh.
description:
Fix a bug where the loading spinner persists indefinitely if a user selects an object from the dropdown and then immediately unchecks it. The loading overlay stays on and requires a browser refresh to dismiss.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Open the object dropdown
2. Check an object
3. Immediately uncheck the same object
4. Loading screen stays on — browser refresh required
acceptance_criteria: Loading spinner dismisses when an object is quickly checked and unchecked
No browser refresh required to recover from rapid toggling
Loading spinner correctly tracks the async operation state
ux_changes: Fixed loading spinner state management to correctly dismiss when object selection is rapidly toggled.
implementation_notes: Race condition in the loading state management. The uncheck event fired before the check event's async operation completed, leaving the spinner in a stuck state.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the race condition and submitted for review.
